---
title: "Data Test Report"
author: "PEGASUS DACS"
format: pdf
jupyter: pegasus-venv
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
params:
  mission_id: "PEG_ENG1_INJ1_FSS_CF_Seq2-1"
---


```{python}
#| include: false

import sys
print(sys.executable)
print(sys.path)


import os
from dotenv import load_dotenv
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import pandas as pd
from IPython.display import Markdown, display

from src.db import connect, get_series_by_subsystem, get_console_messages #, get_metadata

import sys
print(sys.executable)
print(sys.path)


# .env datei laden mit richtigen parametern für connection
load_dotenv()

URL    = os.environ["INFLUX_URL"]
TOKEN  = os.environ["INFLUX_TOKEN"]
ORG    = os.environ["INFLUX_ORG"]
BUCKET = os.environ["INFLUX_BUCKET"]

client = connect(URL, TOKEN, ORG)

# Hole den Parameter aus dem YAML ganz oben
try:
    mission_id = params["mission_id"]
except NameError:
    mission_id = "PEG_ENG1_INJ1_FSS_CF_Seq2-1"  # Fallback für direktes Ausführen

if not mission_id:
    raise RuntimeError("Pass mission_id via: quarto render report.qmd -P mission_id:FIRING_...")

# comment: meta, START, END = get_metadata(client, BUCKET, mission_id)



# Alle Subsystems die geplotted werden sollen
SUBSYSTEMS = ["FSS", "OSS", "IGN", "ENG", "INJ", "VAR"]


# (<Kategoriename>, (<Name measurement in DB>, <Y-Achsenbeschriftung>))
CATEGORIES = [
    ("Massflow", ("massflowSensor", "Massflow [g/s]")),   # measurement, field
    ("Loadcell", ("loadcell", "Weight [KG]")),  # optional: weight
    ("Pressure Sensor", ("pressureSensor", "Pressure [bar]")),  # optional: dynamic_pressure
    ("Thermocouple", ("temperatureSensor", "Temperature [°C]")),
]

# Funktion zum Plotten der Daten pro Sensor
def plot_by_sensor(df, title, ylabel, time_range=None, highlight_range=None):
    if df.empty:
        return
    if time_range is not None:
        start, end = time_range
        df = df[(df["time"] >= start) & (df["time"] <= end)]
        if df.empty:
            return
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 4))
    for sid, group in df.groupby("sensorId"):
        ax.plot(group["time"], group["value"], label=str(sid))
    # Add gray box for the actual sequence interval
    if highlight_range is not None:
        highlight_start, highlight_end = highlight_range
        ax.axvspan(highlight_start, highlight_end, color='gray', alpha=0.3)
    ax.legend()
    ax.set_title(title)
    ax.set_xlabel("Time")
    ax.set_ylabel(ylabel)
    ax.grid(True)
    fig.tight_layout()
    plt.show()
```

```{python}
#| echo: false

display(Markdown(f"## Mission ID: {mission_id}"))
```

```{python}
#| echo: false

# Get console messages from db 
df_console_messages = get_console_messages(client, BUCKET, mission_id)

# Extract sequence name from df
seq_rows = df_console_messages[df_console_messages["value"].str.startswith("[SEQ] Initiating")]
seq_names = seq_rows["value"].str.extract(r"\[SEQ\] Initiating (.+)")[0].tolist()

# Get sequence start and stop times
seq_timestamps = df_console_messages[df_console_messages["value"].str.startswith("[SEQ]")]["time"].tolist()

# Create combined_seq_times containing start, end, buffered start, and buffered end times as well as sequence names
relative_buffer_time = 0.1
combined_seq_times = []
name_idx = 0
for i in range(0, len(seq_timestamps) - 1, 2):
    start = seq_timestamps[i]
    end = seq_timestamps[i+1]
    buffer = relative_buffer_time * (end - start)
    start_buf = start - buffer
    end_buf = end + buffer    
    name = seq_names[name_idx] if name_idx < len(seq_names) else ""
    combined_seq_times.append((start, end, start_buf, end_buf, name))
    name_idx += 1

# Plot data depending on if sequence is detected or not
if combined_seq_times:
    # Plot only the time interval of buffered sequence and indicate the sequence time interval
    for start, end, start_buf, end_buf, name in combined_seq_times:
        display(Markdown(f"**Sequence detected: {name}**"))
        for i, subsystem in enumerate(SUBSYSTEMS):
            # Prüfe ob dieses Subsystem irgendwelche Daten hat
            has_data = False
            subsystem_data = {}
            for cat_name, (measurement, ylabel) in CATEGORIES:
                df = get_series_by_subsystem(client, BUCKET, measurement, mission_id, subsystem)
                subsystem_data[cat_name] = (df, ylabel)
                if not df.empty:
                    has_data = True
            
            if not has_data:
                continue  # Subsystem komplett überspringen
            
            # für jedes Subsystem eine neue Seite anfangen
            if i > 0:
                display(Markdown(r"\newpage"))
            display(Markdown(f"# Subsystem: {subsystem}"))
            for cat_name, (df, ylabel) in subsystem_data.items():
                if df.empty:
                    continue
                display(Markdown(f"## {cat_name}"))
                plot_by_sensor(df, f"{subsystem} – {cat_name}", ylabel, time_range=(start_buf, end_buf), highlight_range=(start, end))
else:
    # No sequence found: plot the whole time interval
    display(Markdown("**No sequence is present in the data for this mission id. Plotting all available data.**"))
    for i, subsystem in enumerate(SUBSYSTEMS):
        has_data = False
        subsystem_data = {}
        for cat_name, (measurement, ylabel) in CATEGORIES:
            df = get_series_by_subsystem(client, BUCKET, measurement, mission_id, subsystem)
            subsystem_data[cat_name] = (df, ylabel)
            if not df.empty:
                has_data = True

        if not has_data:
            continue

        if i > 0:
            display(Markdown(r"\newpage"))
        display(Markdown(f"# Subsystem: {subsystem}"))

        for cat_name, (df, ylabel) in subsystem_data.items():
            if df.empty:
                continue
            display(Markdown(f"## {cat_name}"))
            plot_by_sensor(df, f"{subsystem} – {cat_name}", ylabel)
```
